summary: AI/ML Engineer with 3 years of experience in Generative AI, Agentic AI, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs), and intelligent automation. Skilled in designing, developing, and deploying AI-powered applications using Python, FastAPI, React, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Vector Databases, Prompt Engineering, and modern AI frameworks. Experienced in building scalable chatbot platforms, multi-agent systems, AI workflows, backend APIs, and enterprise-grade AI solutions. Proficient in AI framework integration, workflow orchestration, conversational AI, and end-to-end application development. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and software engineering skills with a passion for learning emerging technologies, exploring innovative AI advancements, and delivering high-quality, production-ready solutions that improve business efficiency and user experience.
